nodes.context: Colombian drug cartel and paramilitary group engaged in drug trafficking, illegal gold mining, and armed conflict.
Colombian drug cartel from which Los Rastrojos emerged.
Colombian drug cartel considered predecessor of Norte del Valle and Los Rastrojos.
Mexican drug cartel allied with Los Rastrojos.
Colombian drug trafficking organization led by Daniel Barrera.
Colombian criminal organization based in Envigado.
Colombian criminal group rival to Los Rastrojos.

edges.evidence_quote: The Rastrojos were born out of the powerful Norte del Valle drug cartel
edges.context: Los Rastrojos originated as a splinter from the Norte del Valle Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: Los Rastrojos are, together with the Norte del Valle cartel, considered the 'heirs' of the Cali cartel.
edges.context: Los Rastrojos and Norte del Valle are considered successors of the Cali Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: Currently, the Rastrojos have an agreement with the National Liberation Army (Ejército de Liberación Nacional – ELN) for several years in the departments of Cauca and Nariño.
edges.context: Los Rastrojos had a cooperative agreement with the ELN for several years.

edges.evidence_quote: More recently they obtained a similar agreement with the Revolutionary Armed Forces of Colombia (Fuerzas Armadas Revolucionarias de Colombia – FARC) in other parts of the country.
edges.context: Los Rastrojos had a cooperative agreement with the FARC.

edges.evidence_quote: By March 2020, Los Rastrojos no longer had an alliance with the Colombian left-wing militant group National Liberation Army (ELN) and was now involved in a direct armed conflict with the group as well.
edges.context: Los Rastrojos entered into armed conflict with the ELN after the alliance ended.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, Barrera cartel, The Office of Envigado
edges.context: Sinaloa Cartel is listed as an ally of Los Rastrojos in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, Barrera cartel, The Office of Envigado
edges.context: Barrera Cartel is listed as an ally of Los Rastrojos in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel, Barrera cartel, The Office of Envigado
edges.context: The Office of Envigado is listed as an ally of Los Rastrojos in the infobox.
Clan del Golfo is listed as a rival of Los Rastrojos in the infobox.
